message:
fix: address code review bugs in UI components

- SwipeablePromptCard: fix timer leak on rapid tap by clearing existing
  longPressTimer before setting a new one (prevents multiple long-press
  callbacks from firing)

- FeatureSubmitForm: prevent double submission on fast double-click by
  adding a ref-based synchronous guard (React state updates are async,
  so button can be clicked twice before disabled state renders)

- SpotlightSearch: add focus restoration on dialog close for
  accessibility (saves previously focused element and restores it when
  the dialog closes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
